summary: predicates.ts uses raw event string literals instead of canonical EventName enum — 10 of 17 strings are unregistered in EventName
State machine evaluatePredicate is a simplified heuristic that diverges from the richer predicates.ts resolvers — SM-003 acknowledged as deferred
Two secretary _tag values (LearningComplete, PlanReady) collapse to the same state machine event 'plan.produced', erasing semantic distinction
